query:
UPDATE invoices i
SET 
  subtotal_net = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_total_net), 0) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id),
  tax_amount = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_tax), 0) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id),
  total_gross = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(line_total_net) + SUM(line_tax), 0) FROM invoice_items WHERE invoice_id = i.id),
  updated_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE invoice_number = 'AN-2026-1861';
